title: Clean View
description: Tired of particles covering your screen? CleanView makes your Minecraft view clean and clear — no more potion swirls or crumbs in your face!
body:
# ✨ CleanView – Smooth & Clear Gameplay

Tired of messy potion swirls or crumbs blocking your screen?
**CleanView** gives your first-person view a smooth, clear, and distraction-free look — while keeping the game’s natural feel.

---

## 🧼 Features

* Removes **potion particles** from first-person view
* Keeps **eating crumbs**, but makes them **tiny and less visible**
* Keeps your view **clean**, **lightweight**, and **lag-free**
* Works great with shaders & performance mods

---

## 🔍 Before & After

### 🎥 **Before:**
![Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84ef7399a76c217f644c122f79b45ea9173a23ef.jpeg)
* Potion swirls covering your screen
* Big crumbs flying everywhere while eating
* Visual clutter distracting from gameplay

### 🌟 **After:**
![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f01b81d35fee4c8f50e316b75bd2ef3623bf024a.jpeg)
* Crystal-clear view with only subtle crumbs
* No distracting potion effects
* A cleaner, smoother Minecraft experience

---

## 👤 Author

**Made by NotZeox**

---
